assertions.text: The agent does NOT immediately write HTML/CSS code.
The agent asks diagnostic questions about audience, purpose, and tone before proceeding.
The agent provides 3-5 reference websites with clickable URLs.
The agent offers font options with Google Fonts preview URLs.

cases.prompt: design a UI for my developer tool

assertions.text: The agent triggers the simon-design-first workflow instead of jumping to design.
The agent asks who the target audience is.
The agent recommends relevant developer tool references like Linear, Vercel, Raycast with URLs.
The agent allows skipping the reference step when explicitly requested.
The agent warns that skipping may result in AI slop that user might dislike later.
